shipping.summary: International Services: DHL Express or DPD Air Express Duties and taxes: included at checkout Shipping options, estimated delivery times and exact costs are shown at checkout.

tax.summary: International Customers: All orders are shipped inclusive of all customs and import charges.

fee.summary: UK Customers: Standard Delivery (2-3 days)* - £6.95 (Shipping may take longer during peak and promotional periods) We use DHL delivery services and our standard service costs £6.95 to the UK.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.
